Interface IStretchFunctionArguments2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control stretch function arguments.

[Guid("248E30E5-B730-487D-822B-0E25E8BBCF1C")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IStretchFunctionArguments2 : IStretchFunctionArguments

Properties

ComputeGamma

Indicates if gamma values should be computed by default.

bool ComputeGamma { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

DRA

Indicates if Dynamic Range Adjustment should be applied.

bool DRA { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

EstimateStatsHistogram

Indicates if statistics and histograms should be computed (estimated) if none existss.

bool EstimateStatsHistogram { get; set; }

Property Value

bool
